# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting:
👉 [Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/Harborline-Software/the-inverted-stack/security/advisories/new)

We follow coordinated disclosure. Expected response: within 7 days.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| `main` | ✅ |
